# Chapter 7: Length, area, volume, mass  (~70 pp)

- 7.1 Length: ruler to interferometer (12)
- 7.2 Area, volume, density (10)
- 7.3 Mass: balance, scale, recoil mass spectrometer (12)
- 7.4 Specialised quantities: viscosity, hardness, surface roughness (15)
- 7.5 Cross-checking: independent measurements of the same quantity (10)
- 7.6 Failure section: when the ruler was wrong (e.g., Hubble's primary mirror) (11)

**Archetype**: scaling, balance.
**Project**: measure the volume of an irregular object three ways (immersion, integration of a 3D scan, geometric approximation); reconcile.
**Exercises**: 28.
